protocol.name: vicinae_hotkey_v1
protocol.copyright:

protocol.description: This protocol lets a client choose, and freely reconfigure, its own global hotkeys: it requests a specific key combination and the compositor accepts it or rejects it with a reason. The compositor remains the eventual arbiter (it may deny a request, revoke a binding at any time, or apply whatever policy it likes), but within that the application manages its own bindings, including changing them at runtime, with no out-of-band user configuration and no persisted compositor state.

interface.name: vicinae_hotkey_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface is the entry point of the protocol. It is used to request global hotkeys.

enum.name: modifiers

description.summary: modifier keys required by a hotkey

enum.description: A bitmask of the modifiers that must be held for the hotkey to fire. Lock modifiers are never part of a binding and are ignored when matching.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the manager object. Hotkey objects created through this manager are unaffected and remain valid.

request.name: bind
request.description: Request that the given key combination be bound as a global hotkey.

arg.name: seat
arg.summary: target seat, or null for all of the client's seats

description.summary: why a bind request was denied

entry.name: not_permitted
entry.summary: the combination is disallowed by compositor policy

entry.name: invalid
entry.summary: the keysym or combination is not a valid trigger

description.summary: why a previously bound hotkey was withdrawn

entry.name: removed
entry.summary: withdrawn by the user or compositor

entry.name: superseded
entry.summary: a higher-priority binding took the combination

entry.name: not_permitted
entry.summary: the combination is no longer allowed by policy

request.name: destroy
request.description: Release the binding and destroy the object.

event.name: bound
event.description: The requested combination was accepted and is now active.

event.name: denied
event.description: The requested combination was not bound.

event.name: revoked

description.summary: a previously active hotkey was withdrawn

event.description: A binding that was previously "bound" is no longer active.

event.name: released
event.description: The trigger key of a previously pressed combination was released.
